scripts.docs: npm run build:packages && npm -w @form2js/docs run dev
scripts.docs:build: npm run build:packages && npm -w @form2js/docs run build
scripts.test: npm run test:packages && npm run test:integration && npm run test:docs
scripts.test:docs: npm run build:packages && DOCS_E2E_PORT=4329 npm -w @form2js/docs run test:e2e
scripts.pack:dry-run: npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/core && npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/dom && npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/form-data && npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/js2form && npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/jquery && npm_config_cache=/tmp/form2js-npm-cache npm pack --dry-run --workspace @form2js/react
